name: whatup
description: Dev orchestration for the WhatUp monorepo — run `npm run dev` to start everything.

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait && concurrently -k -n backend,twilio,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:twilio" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix whatup-backend install && npm --prefix twilio-mock install && npm --prefix whatup-admin install
